sidebar.title:
Demand
Assistant Agent
sidebar.tagline: Impact study, effort estimation, risk mapping, backlog analysis. Assesses every demand for strategic fit and cost before it enters the backlog.

principle.label: ⚡ Key Principle — Efficiency-first
principle.text: Every demand is assessed for strategic fit and cost-benefit before entering the backlog. No item moves to sprint without meeting Definition of Ready.

card.title: Demand Management Interface
card.note: PM or delivery lead submits demands and reviews AI-generated analysis in a guided workflow

components.name: Impact Analyser
components.note: Analyse new requirements and compare with current implementations across BAs

components.name: Effort Estimator
components.note: Suggest high-level time and effort estimation based on historical data

components.name: Backlog Qualifier
components.note: Validate backlog items against Definition of Ready compliance criteria

components.name: Timeline Builder
components.note: Build project timeline and create project structure from estimation output

components.name: Strategic Fit & Risk Assessment
components.note: Cross-cut value proposition analysis — strategic alignment, risk mapping, dependency impact

cards.name: PM Best Practices
cards.desc: Estimation frameworks · DoR checklists · planning guidelines

cards.name: Business Strategy Context
cards.desc: Strategic priorities · roadmap · portfolio alignment criteria

rag.label: RAG / Retrieval Pipeline
rag.body: Semantic search over historical demands, estimation baselines, retrospectives, and vendor documentation

cards.name: Project Management
cards.detail: Backlog · sprint tracking · demand intake · change requests

cards.name: Portfolio & Strategy
cards.detail: Strategic roadmap · portfolio prioritisation · investment tracking

cards.name: Document Repositories
cards.detail: Demand specs · estimation docs · process documentation

cards.name: Vendor & Tooling
cards.detail: Vendor roadmaps · tool evaluations · feature tracking
